# `library_codex.math.AdvancedMatrix`

合成数法行列式・Hafnian/Pfaffian・Matrix-Tree。

- 計算量の目安: determinant/Pfaffian $O(N^3)$、Hafnian $O(N^3 2^{N/2})$
- source: [`math/AdvancedMatrix.py`](../../../math/AdvancedMatrix.py)
- 公開API: function 5、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.math.AdvancedMatrix import (
    determinant_arbitrary_mod,
    hafnian,
    pfaffian,
    spanning_tree_count,
    directed_spanning_tree_count,
)
```
